notes_append: Use this seed as the starting point for a Zephyr custom board named dg_evk.
Preserves the existing lab validation profile for mimxrt1170-class hardware unless hardware wiring changes.

zephyr_board_porting_tasks: copy mimxrt1170_evk board directory to dg_evk
rename DTS, YAML, and defconfig files to dg_evk naming
adjust pinctrl, flash, ethernet, display, and connector mappings
validate build and flash on real hardware
assumptions: Revision model remains A/B unless changed later.
Initial capability set matches mimxrt1170_evk until custom hardware deltas are defined.
